atRules.name: @reference
atRules.description: Imports a CSS file for reference only in Tailwind CSS v4. No CSS is emitted from the imported file.

atRules.name: @theme
atRules.description: Defines the Tailwind CSS v4 theme block.

atRules.name: @plugin
atRules.description: Registers a Tailwind CSS v4 plugin.

atRules.name: @utility
atRules.description: Defines a custom utility class in Tailwind CSS v4.

atRules.name: @variant
atRules.description: Defines a custom variant in Tailwind CSS v4.
